title: Perdure Goal Event
description: One immutable, tamper-evident entry in a goal run's append-only history (events.jsonl). Each line of the log is one event. Carries a logical sequence number rather than a wall clock (so deterministic runs chain identically) and a SHA-256 hash chain (prev_hash/entry_hash) so any edit, insertion, removal, or reorder is detectable by `perdure guard audit`.

event_id.description: Stable id derived from seq, e.g. evt_000007.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence number within the run.

kind.description: The event kind. The vocabulary is open for forward compatibility; the documented kinds are listed in the enum.

prev_hash.description: The entry_hash of the previous event, or 'genesis' for the first. Links the chain.

entry_hash.description: SHA-256 (hex) over this event's canonical content excluding entry_hash itself. Self-authenticating.
